_comment_1: Talent-Augmenting Layer MCP server config for OpenAI Codex CLI. Save this at ~/.codex/config.json (or merge into your existing file). Codex CLI follows the standard MCP stdio config shape; verify against the latest Codex docs if your version expects TOML instead.
_comment_2: Replace /path/to/talent-augmenting-layer with the absolute path to the checked-out repo on your machine.
